title: elaphoglossum lenticulatum
intro: Elaphoglossum lenticulatum, also known as the lentil shield fern or silver-veined fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Elaphoglossum lenticulatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues, making it a valuable asset in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or combining them with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
